title: Overclocked Watches
description: Use three new watches to speed up time! Growth of crops, animals or day/night cycles...
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Overclocked_Watches/MP_OverclockedWatches_header.webp) Overclocked Watches adds three new watches, which will have different utilities related to the passage of time. Now, players will have the possibility to speed it up as they wish, and for example, these clocks will make crops grow much faster, also baby animals, and it will also be possible to change the day/night cycle. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Overclocked_Watches/MP_OverclockedWatches_summary.webp) By using the three new watches, which are to be placed in the additional slots of Curios API (Forge/NeoForge) or Trinkets (Fabric), the time will pass much faster for the following daily tasks! - Plant growth. - Animal growth. - Change day/night cycle by pressing “O” key. The three added watches are the gold watch, the diamond watch, and the netherite watch. All have a certain durability, and will break if used too much, plus a cooldown when using the day/night cycle. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Overclocked_Watches/MP_OverclockedWatches_faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Overclocked_Watches/MP_OverclockedWatches_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Uk12PwL9/images/bf288e0af0d7660f8edc8bf13d189fdc55bea807.png) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Uk12PwL9/images/4eaac4062c3688f0f635a38ba2f6a9e2d742481a.png) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Uk12PwL9/images/6d2f26087a4320a22494217e2a8a5211d1f744b9.png) ![Screenshots 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Uk12PwL9/images/12c59cb131f95781580402205796ef02f18fb285.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
